title: Combat Kills
query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bounty WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) AS count, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(TotalReward) FROM Bounty WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Reward) FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS totalReward
